title: Thai Coconut Paska Bread
description: A sweet and fluffy Ukrainian-inspired bread infused with the flavors of Thailand, perfect for breakfast or as a snack.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine yeast and warm water. Let it sit for 5 minutes until frothy.
2. Add flour, paska, sugar, and egg to the bowl. Mix until a sticky dough forms.
3. Add coconut milk and melted coconut oil to the dough. Mix until well combined.
4. Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
5. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
7. Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf.
8. Place the loaf on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes until golden brown.
10. Let the bread cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before slicing.
